recommendations.title: Alien: Romulus
recommendations.overview: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Spider's Web
recommendations.overview: After being enlisted to recover a dangerous computer program, hacker Lisbeth Salander and journalist Mikael Blomkvist find themselves caught in a web of spies, cybercriminals and corrupt government officials.

recommendations.title: Evil Dead
recommendations.overview: Mia, a drug addict, is determined to kick the habit. To that end, she asks her brother, David, his girlfriend, Natalie and their friends Olivia and Eric to accompany her to their family's remote forest cabin to help her through withdrawal. Eric finds

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: Don't Breathe 2
recommendations.overview: The Blind Man has been hiding out for several years in an isolated cabin and has taken in and raised a young girl orphaned from a devastating house fire. Their quiet life together is shattered when a group of criminals kidnap the girl, forcing the Bl

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.

recommendations.title: Braven
recommendations.overview: A logger defends his family from a group of dangerous drug runners.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: Project Almanac
recommendations.overview: A group of teens discover secret plans of a time machine, and construct one. However, things start to get out of control.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.
